response.justification: Sarah Smith's resume demonstrates extensive experience in full-stack development, AI-agent infrastructure, and performance optimization, but lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator optimization. Her background in web and embedded systems does not align closely with the Principal Performance Architect role focused on cloud infrastructure and hardware optimization for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Proven ability to optimize performance in distributed systems and real-time applications
Experience with multiple programming languages and system-level development (C, C++, Dlang)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design for AI accelerators
Lacks direct involvement in GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis
Education and career focus on software development rather than hardware optimization or performance architecture
